reforms.description: The Government has proposed to introduce a countercyclical deposits scheme for companies, aimed at providing additional policy instruments to address economic challenges.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This scheme is intended to stabilize the economy by encouraging companies to save during economic downturns, which can support investment and employment.
reforms.status_evidence: The Government has recently submitted proposals to Parliament to put the present system of price control on a more permanent footing and introduce a countercyclical deposits scheme.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of a countercyclical deposits scheme represents a significant policy tool aimed at stabilizing the economy, reflecting a proactive approach to economic management.
reforms.source_quote: In addition it is proposed to introduce a countercyclical deposits scheme for companies and a selective tax on construction.
